race.comment: HOTINHERRE (5) caught the eye late first-up when a big price. Was again doing her best work late last time but just got too far back. There's a chance that might happen again from the wide draw, but she should be nearing peak fitness and this isn't as strong as the past two starts. RUSSIAN RONI (2) was below his best last time, finishing sixth and beaten 4 lengths over 1746m at Sale. The three runs since the picnic victory have all been in 62 grade, so he'll appreciate a look at 56 company. NORTHWOOD VAMOOSE (10) was in the firing line on the corner first-up before being beaten 3.5 lengths into sixth over 1732m at Sale. She'll have come on from that and the drop back in grade probably suits as well. STAND BY ME NED (3) ran his best race of the prep last start and has previously won at 1600m. FOGGY BOTTOM (7) was terrible last start but was beaten 3/4 of a length the start prior in 62 grade so deserves another chance.
